name: GTA 3 ALPHA 2.0 MOD FOR ANDROID
description: This mod was ported from the 2014 GTA3 Alpha 2.0 mod to mobile devices. Most of the features have been transferred over. However, there are currently some issues: in the "One-Armed Man" mission, players need to cling to walls to complete certain actions, and the final mission of "Diablos" sometimes crashes. Hope everyone has a good time playing it!
creator: GTAinside.com

name: Declasse Walton L35 Stock
description:
Declasse Walton L35 Stock
By MrFinger

Ever wanted a compact redneck pickup in your LC? Then go and grab Declasse Walton L35 Stock. Features colors distributed so that the primary is assigned to the upper section, the secondary runs along the middle part, while the lower section is marked by the third. It features a couple of extras: either a plastic grille with vertical slits, or a chrome one with or without vertical slits. The bed features the following extras: a landscaping set, a set of scraps or a service & repair setup. All of them have proper collision properties. It can also spawn with a "Retro Vibes" livery. The SA cutscene Washington-esque roof height also has been adjusted.
creator: GTAinside.com

name: [GTA III] Redone Police Car
description:
This mod is a edit of the default LCPD police car, to give it a "Modern" NYPD style livery,
i made it a challenge for myself to change it while also keeping it as minimalist, as i could
to match GTA III's atmosphere, this is why the car lacks things like PCT numbers and Police on the fenders.

With this mod, you are given 3 livery choices, this also comes with 3 light bars that cycle as extras.

1) Default Option - NYPD Style livery
2) GTA III Style Livery mixed with NYPD
3) GTA IV Style Livery

-Mod Installation-
Tools you will need before hand.

Mod Loader
https://gtaforums.com/topic/669520-mod-loader/

(Step 1) Change the Default Datalines to the ones below.
>>>>> ALWAYS MAKE BACK UPS BEFORE DOING SO.<<<<<<

-Datalines-
/-CARCOLS-/
police, 1,1
/-DEFAULT.IDE-/
116, police, police, car, POLICE, POLICAR, ignore, 1, 7, 1210, 161, 0.7

(Step 2) Head into the Choose your Car! Folder and then choose what livery you would want.

(Step 3) Run Game and Enjoy!


-/CURRENT BUGS And Roadmap/-
I need to repos. the lighting of the light bar slightly lower, also have to make a matching
Enforcer mod down the road.
creator: GTAinside.com
